_description: Persistent machine-readable memory for AI coding sessions. Copy to .copilot/memory.json and fill in your values.

tools_installed.analyze: tools/analyze.py - DuckDB queries, charts, JSON diff, HTML reports
tools_installed.context7: tools/context7.py - real-time library docs via Context7 MCP
tools_installed.mslearn: tools/mslearn.py - official MS Learn docs via HTTP MCP

schemas.dbo: Description of tables in dbo schema

gotchas: Add hard-won API lessons here so you don't re-learn them
Example: updateDefinition requires ALL files, not partial
Example: 202 responses have literal 'null' as body text

experiment_results._note: Record key findings so the assistant doesn't re-run them
